humanSummary.text: Post-repair audit found no P0/P1 blockers after Utsushi producers began advertising instrumentation hook capability. Two non-blocking parity hardening gaps remain for reports that omit runtimeCapabilities and reports whose controlledPlaybackSession.featuresUsed omits instrumentation_hooks while hook events are present.

findings.title: Runtime hook capability requirement can be bypassed without runtimeCapabilities
findings.description: The TypeScript runtime evidence validator rejects observationHookEvents without an instrumentation_hooks capability only when runtimeCapabilities exists. A report with hook events and no runtimeCapabilities object can still be accepted.

evidence.detail: Audit inspected the post-repair TypeScript validator and found the instrumentation_hooks capability guard is nested under the runtimeCapabilities-present branch.
Remote CI and Hello World are green at 313dfbf, so this is tracked as a non-blocking hardening follow-up rather than a completion blocker.

findings.impact: A producer can emit hook events without advertising hook support, weakening evidence comparability for Utsushi runtime reviews.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: RuntimeEvidenceReportV02 validation rejects observationHookEvents when runtimeCapabilities is absent.
RuntimeEvidenceReportV02 validation rejects observationHookEvents when runtimeCapabilities omits instrumentation_hooks or marks it unsupported.
TypeScript and Rust schema tests cover missing runtimeCapabilities, unsupported instrumentation_hooks, and valid supported or partial instrumentation_hooks cases.

proposedDagNode.title: Runtime hook capability missing-report guard
proposedDagNode.summary: Harden RuntimeEvidenceReportV02 validation so observationHookEvents require runtimeCapabilities with supported or partial instrumentation_hooks capability even when runtimeCapabilities would otherwise be omitted.
deliverables: TypeScript runtime evidence validator guard for missing runtimeCapabilities
Rust schema parity check for hook events and instrumentation_hooks capability
Regression fixtures for missing, unsupported, partial, and supported hook capability cases
acceptanceCriteria: Reports with observationHookEvents and missing runtimeCapabilities fail validation.
Reports with observationHookEvents and missing or unsupported instrumentation_hooks fail validation.
Reports with observationHookEvents and supported or partial instrumentation_hooks continue to pass.
auditFocus: TypeScript and Rust runtime evidence validation parity
Hook events accepted without capability disclosure

findings.title: Runtime hook evidence does not require matching controlled playback feature usage
findings.description: RuntimeEvidenceReportV02 can include observationHookEvents while controlledPlaybackSession.featuresUsed does not include instrumentation_hooks.

evidence.detail: Audit inspected controlledPlaybackSession validation and found no consistency rule tying hook events to instrumentation_hooks in featuresUsed.

findings.impact: Runtime evidence can under-report which replay features were used, making review dashboards and audit trails less precise.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: Reports with observationHookEvents and controlledPlaybackSession.featuresUsed must include instrumentation_hooks.
Reports without observationHookEvents are unaffected by the new consistency guard.
Utsushi fixture and browser producers emit instrumentation_hooks in featuresUsed when hook events are present.

proposedDagNode.title: Runtime hook featuresUsed consistency guard
proposedDagNode.summary: Require controlled playback reports with observationHookEvents to declare instrumentation_hooks in featuresUsed and keep Utsushi fixture producers aligned with that contract.
deliverables: RuntimeEvidenceReportV02 validation rule for hook events and featuresUsed
Fixture and browser producer updates if needed
Regression tests for hook and non-hook controlled playback reports
acceptanceCriteria: Reports with observationHookEvents and controlledPlaybackSession.featuresUsed lacking instrumentation_hooks fail validation.
Reports without observationHookEvents are not required to declare instrumentation_hooks.
Utsushi generated fixture evidence remains schema-valid under the stricter rule.
auditFocus: False positives for reports without hook events
